tasks.label: photo-note: stop-dev
args: mkdir -p .copilot-tmp && rm -f .copilot-tmp/stopped-pids.txt .copilot-tmp/post-stop-processes.txt && pids=$(ps -eo pid=,cmd= | awk "/\/workspaces\/photo_note/ && (/vite/ || /server\/index\.mjs/ || /npm run dev/) { print \\$1 }"); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then printf "%s\n" "$pids" > .copilot-tmp/stopped-pids.txt; kill $pids 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 2; survivors=$(ps -o pid= -p $pids 2>/dev/null | tr -d " " | sed "/^$/d"); if [ -n "$survivors" ]; then kill -9 $survivors 2>/dev/null || true; fi; else : > .copilot-tmp/stopped-pids.txt; fi; ps -eo pid=,cmd= | awk "/\/workspaces\/photo_note/ && (/vite/ || /server\/index\.mjs/ || /npm run dev/)" > .copilot-tmp/post-stop-processes.txt || true

tasks.label: photo-note: start-dev
args: mkdir -p .copilot-tmp && rm -f .copilot-tmp/dev-server.pid .copilot-tmp/start-process.txt .copilot-tmp/dev-server.log; setsid npm run dev > .copilot-tmp/dev-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & pid=$!; echo $pid > .copilot-tmp/dev-server.pid; sleep 5; ps -p "$pid" -o pid=,cmd= > .copilot-tmp/start-process.txt || true

tasks.label: photo-note: verify-dev
args: mkdir -p .copilot-tmp && { echo "[processes]"; ps -eo pid=,cmd= | awk "/\/workspaces\/photo_note/ && (/vite/ || /server\/index\.mjs/ || /npm run dev/)" || true; echo; echo "[ports]"; lsof -nP -iTCP -sTCP:LISTEN | awk "/node|vite/" || true; echo; echo "[log tail]"; tail -n 40 .copilot-tmp/dev-server.log 2>/dev/null || true; } > .copilot-tmp/dev-status.txt

tasks.label: photo-note: start-api
args: mkdir -p .copilot-tmp && rm -f .copilot-tmp/api-server.pid .copilot-tmp/api-start-process.txt .copilot-tmp/api-server.log; setsid npm run dev:api > .copilot-tmp/api-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & pid=$!; echo $pid > .copilot-tmp/api-server.pid; sleep 3; ps -p "$pid" -o pid=,cmd= > .copilot-tmp/api-start-process.txt || true

tasks.label: photo-note: verify-api
args: mkdir -p .copilot-tmp && { echo "[processes]"; ps -eo pid=,cmd= | awk "/\/workspaces\/photo_note/ && /server\/index\.mjs/" || true; echo; echo "[ports]"; lsof -nP -iTCP -sTCP:LISTEN | awk "/node|:8787/" || true; echo; echo "[health]"; curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:8787/api/ocr/health || true; echo; echo "[log tail]"; tail -n 40 .copilot-tmp/api-server.log 2>/dev/null || true; } > .copilot-tmp/api-status.txt
